languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with machine spirits."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн добродушно посмеивается.{/n} "Считать, что все техножрецы говорят исключительно подобно машинам — распространенное заблуждение среди мирян. Пусть мы и стремимся к тождеству с Омниссией, мы все еще часть рода человеческого. Как именно добиваться тождества — выбор каждого посвященного в духовенство Марса, во многом зависящий от личных особенностей, практических соображений и трактовок догматов веры. Безусловно, многие уподобляют свою речь машинной или даже предпочитает не использовать плотьяз вовсе — так им проще вступать в контакт с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн добродушно посмеивается.{/n} "Считать, что все техножрецы говорят исключительно подобно машинам — распространенное заблуждение среди мирян. Пусть мы и стремимся к тождеству с Омниссией, мы все еще часть рода человеческого. Как именно добиваться тождества — выбор каждого посвященного в духовенство Марса, во многом зависящий от личных особенностей, практических соображений и трактовок догматов веры. Безусловно, многие уподобляют свою речь машинной или даже предпочитает не использовать плотьяз вовсе — так им проще вступать в контакт с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g}. Для меня же ключевым аспектом Бога-Машины является его всесведущесть. Я собираю мудрость, в том числе из общения с мирянами — для этого конвенциональный низкий готик пока что оказывается наиболее пригодным".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн добродушно посмеивается.{/n} "Считать, что все техножрецы говорят исключительно подобно машинам — распространенное заблуждение среди мирян. Пусть мы и стремимся к тождеству с Омниссией, мы все еще часть рода человеческого. Как именно добиваться тождества — выбор каждого посвященного в духовенство Марса, во многом зависящий от личных особенностей, практических соображений и трактовок догматов веры. Безусловно, многие уподобляют свою речь машинной или даже предпочитает не использовать плотьяз вовсе — так им проще вступать в контакт с {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинными духами{/g}".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}. For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

{n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. For myself, however, a key aspect of the Machine God is His omniscience. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. I gather wisdom, and that includes from communicating with laypersons — to this end, standard Low Gothic has so far proved to be the most useful. However, this does not negate the fact that I am able to speak all the binharic dialects of Mars, if circumstances so demand."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn deja escapar una risa afable.{/n} «Muchos laicos creen erróneamente que los tecnosacerdotes solo son capaces de hablar como las máquinas. Nos afanamos por acercarnos al Dios Máquina, pero seguimos formando parte de la raza humana. El método para alcanzar dicha unidad corre a cuenta de cada individuo ordenado por el sacerdocio de Marte, y depende en gran medida de sus características personales, de consideraciones prácticas y de su interpretación de los principios de la fe. Por supuesto, muchos asemejan su lenguaje al de las máquinas o prefieren incluso abandonar las lenguas de la carne, pues así les es más fácil comunar con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn deja escapar una risa afable.{/n} «Muchos laicos creen erróneamente que los tecnosacerdotes solo son capaces de hablar como las máquinas. Nos afanamos por acercarnos al Dios Máquina, pero seguimos formando parte de la raza humana. El método para alcanzar dicha unidad corre a cuenta de cada individuo ordenado por el sacerdocio de Marte, y depende en gran medida de sus características personales, de consideraciones prácticas y de su interpretación de los principios de la fe. Por supuesto, muchos asemejan su lenguaje al de las máquinas o prefieren incluso abandonar las lenguas de la carne, pues así les es más fácil comunar con los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g}. Para mí, sin embargo, un aspecto clave del Dios Máquina es Su omnisciencia. Acumulo saber, y esa misión incluye la comunicación con los laicos. Para este propósito, el bajo gótico estándar ha demostrado ser lo más útil. Esto, por otro lado, no niega el hecho de que puedo hablar todos los dialectos binarios de Marte si las circunstancias lo requieren».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡发出一声和善的轻笑。{/n}“认为所有技术神甫都像机械一样说话，是教外人士中普遍存在的误解。我们固然力求接近万机之神，但我们仍然是人类。至于技术神甫究竟要如何实现两者的结合，是每一位火星祭司的个人选择，这在很大程度上取决于个人特质、实际考量，还有对信仰教义的理解。当然，许多人会将自己的语言调谐为机械圣语，甚至倾向于完全摒弃血肉之谈，以便与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡发出一声和善的轻笑。{/n}“认为所有技术神甫都像机械一样说话，是教外人士中普遍存在的误解。我们固然力求接近万机之神，但我们仍然是人类。至于技术神甫究竟要如何实现两者的结合，是每一位火星祭司的个人选择，这在很大程度上取决于个人特质、实际考量，还有对信仰教义的理解。当然，许多人会将自己的语言调谐为机械圣语，甚至倾向于完全摒弃血肉之谈，以便与{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}沟通。不过就我而言，万机之神的一个关键特质就是全知。我广纳智慧，而与教外人士交流就是途径之一。为此，标准低哥特语依然是最有效的工具。不过若情势所需，我能流利使用火星上所有二进制方言，这点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un petit rire cordial.{/n} « Les profanes ont trop souvent tendance à croire que tous les technoprêtres s'expriment exclusivement comme des machines. Nous avons beau nous efforcer de ressembler au Dieu-Machine, nous n'en restons pas moins des êtres humains. Il appartient à chaque personne ordonnée dans le clergé de Mars de choisir la façon dont elle recherchera ce rapprochement, en fonction de ses caractéristiques personnelles, de considérations pratiques et de son interprétation des principes de la foi. Bien entendu, de nombreux membres choisissent de calquer leur langage sur le cantique des machines, ou même d'abandonner toute forme d'expression humaine ; il devient alors bien plus simple pour eux de dialoguer avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn laisse échapper un petit rire cordial.{/n} « Les profanes ont trop souvent tendance à croire que tous les technoprêtres s'expriment exclusivement comme des machines. Nous avons beau nous efforcer de ressembler au Dieu-Machine, nous n'en restons pas moins des êtres humains. Il appartient à chaque personne ordonnée dans le clergé de Mars de choisir la façon dont elle recherchera ce rapprochement, en fonction de ses caractéristiques personnelles, de considérations pratiques et de son interprétation des principes de la foi. Bien entendu, de nombreux membres choisissent de calquer leur langage sur le cantique des machines, ou même d'abandonner toute forme d'expression humaine ; il devient alors bien plus simple pour eux de dialoguer avec les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g}. Pour ma part, j'estime que l'un des aspects essentiels du Dieu-Machine est Son omniscience. J'accumule du savoir de toutes les sources, et notamment en conversant avec des profanes, ce qui rend pour moi l'usage du bas gothique plus qu'utile. Cependant, je demeure parfaitement capable de parler tous les dialectes binhaires de Mars lorsque c'est nécessaire. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein gut gelauntes Lachen aus.{/n} "Die Annahme, alle Techpriester würden wie Maschinen sprechen, ist ein verbreiteter Irrtum des Laienstandes. Wir streben zwar danach, dem Maschinengott näher zu sein, bleiben aber Teil der menschlichen Rasse. Wie genau ein Techpriester diese Einheit erreicht, ist innerhalb der Priesterschaft des Mars eine individuelle Entscheidung, die auf persönlichen Eigenschaften, praktischen Überlegungen und der Interpretation der Glaubensgrundsätze beruht. Natürlich passen viele ihre Ausdrucksweise an die Maschinensprache an oder verzichten ganz auf Fleischsprech ... so fällt es ihnen leichter, Kontakt zu den {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistern{/g} aufzunehmen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn stößt ein gut gelauntes Lachen aus.{/n} "Die Annahme, alle Techpriester würden wie Maschinen sprechen, ist ein verbreiteter Irrtum des Laienstandes. Wir streben zwar danach, dem Maschinengott näher zu sein, bleiben aber Teil der menschlichen Rasse. Wie genau ein Techpriester diese Einheit erreicht, ist innerhalb der Priesterschaft des Mars eine individuelle Entscheidung, die auf persönlichen Eigenschaften, praktischen Überlegungen und der Interpretation der Glaubensgrundsätze beruht. Natürlich passen viele ihre Ausdrucksweise an die Maschinensprache an oder verzichten ganz auf Fleischsprech ... so fällt es ihnen leichter, Kontakt zu den {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistern{/g} aufzunehmen. Für mich persönlich ist ein Schlüsselaspekt des Maschinengottes allerdings seine Allwissenheit. Ich sammle Weisheit und das erfordert die Kommunikation mit Laien ... dabei hat sich Niedergotisch als Sprache der Wahl bewährt. Allerdings widerspricht dies nicht den Umstand, dass ich in allen binhärischen Dialekten des Mars sprechen kann, wenn es die Umstände erfordern."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは穏やかな笑みを浮かべる。{/n}「すべての技術司祭が機械のように話すと考えるのは、世俗の者の間に広まった誤解だ。我々は機械神に近づこうと努めているかもしれないが、人類の一員であることに変わりはない。技術司祭がいかにしてその一体性に至るかは、火星の聖職に叙された各人の選択であり、個人の資質、実際的な事情、そして信仰の教義の解釈に大きく左右される。もちろん、多くの者は自らの言葉をマシン・カントに同調させ、あるいは肉声をまったく用いないことを好む――そうすれば機械霊と接触しやすくなるからだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは穏やかな笑みを浮かべる。{/n}「すべての技術司祭が機械のように話すと考えるのは、世俗の者の間に広まった誤解だ。我々は機械神に近づこうと努めているかもしれないが、人類の一員であることに変わりはない。技術司祭がいかにしてその一体性に至るかは、火星の聖職に叙された各人の選択であり、個人の資質、実際的な事情、そして信仰の教義の解釈に大きく左右される。もちろん、多くの者は自らの言葉をマシン・カントに同調させ、あるいは肉声をまったく用いないことを好む――そうすれば機械霊と接触しやすくなるからだ。」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nazikçe kıkırdıyor.{/n} "Tüm Tekno Rahiplerin yalnızca makineler gibi konuştuğunu düşünmek, ruhban dışı sınıf arasında yaygın bir yanılgıdır. Makine Tanrı'ya yaklaşmaya çalışsak da insan ırkının bir parçası olmaya sürdürüyoruz. Bir Tekno Rahip'in bu birliğe tam olarak nasıl ulaştığı; büyük ölçüde kişisel özelliklere, pratik hususlara ve inancın ilkelerinin yorumlarına bağlı olup Mars Rahipliği'nde vazifelendirilen her bireyin kendi seçimidir. Tabii ki birçoğu, dillerini makine konuşmasına ayarlar veya hatta et konuşmasını hiç kullanmamayı tercih eder. O zaman {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhlarıyla{/g} iletişim kurmaları daha kolay olur."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn lets out a genial chuckle.{/n} "To think that all Tech-Priests speak exclusively like machines is a widespread misconception among the laity. We may strive to draw closer to the Machine God, but we remain part of the human race. How exactly a Tech-Priest achieves this oneness is the choice of each individual ordained in the priesthood of Mars, depending largely on personal characteristics, practical considerations, and interpretations of the tenets of the faith. Of course, many attune their language to Machine Cant or even prefer not to use flesh-speak at all — it is then easier for them to make contact with {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nazikçe kıkırdıyor.{/n} "Tüm Tekno Rahiplerin yalnızca makineler gibi konuştuğunu düşünmek, ruhban dışı sınıf arasında yaygın bir yanılgıdır. Makine Tanrı'ya yaklaşmaya çalışsak da insan ırkının bir parçası olmaya sürdürüyoruz. Bir Tekno Rahip'in bu birliğe tam olarak nasıl ulaştığı; büyük ölçüde kişisel özelliklere, pratik hususlara ve inancın ilkelerinin yorumlarına bağlı olup Mars Rahipliği'nde vazifelendirilen her bireyin kendi seçimidir. Tabii ki birçoğu, dillerini makine konuşmasına ayarlar veya hatta et konuşmasını hiç kullanmamayı tercih eder. O zaman {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhlarıyla{/g} iletişim kurmaları daha kolay olur. Ancak benim için Makine Tanrı'nın temel bir yönü, O'nun her şeyi bilmesidir. Ben irfan toplayıcısıyım, işime ruhban olmayanlarla iletişim kurmak da dâhil. Bu doğrultuda standart Adi Gotik dili, şimdiye kadar en yararlısı olduğunu kanıtladı."
